semantic.role: Demonstration asset summary for the ArchSpine mirror system
responsibilities: Provides a visual demo of the ArchSpine system in action
Serves as a placeholder for animated demonstration content

English.purpose: This document summarizes the demo.gif file, which serves as a visual demonstration of the ArchSpine mirror system's functionality.
English.context_and_audience: Intended for developers and users who want a quick visual overview of the system's behavior without reading detailed documentation.
key_takeaways: The demo.gif provides an animated preview of the ArchSpine system
It is a placeholder asset for demonstration purposes
The summary is currently in Simplified Chinese

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档总结了 demo.gif 文件，该文件作为 ArchSpine 镜像系统的视觉演示，展示系统核心功能。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 面向希望快速了解系统行为的开发者和用户，无需阅读详细文档即可获得直观印象。
key_takeaways: demo.gif 提供了 ArchSpine 系统的动画预览
该文件是用于演示目的的占位资源
当前摘要以简体中文编写
